overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a cyberpunk-style shanty camp beneath a massive illuminated overpass at night. The scene features a large bonfire, makeshift shelters, and towering neon-lit skyscrapers in the background, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: red couch with seated figure exits frame to the right as camera moves forward

agents.ego_description: walking slowly forward through the camp area past the bonfire on the left

notable_agents.action: seated figure on red couch observing the bonfire

entered.detail: large burning fire with orange flames illuminating the immediate area
makeshift seating with cushions and debris next to it
massive curved overpass with purple neon lighting along its supports
tall buildings with illuminated billboards and vertical neon signs in the background
rusted barrels and wooden crates scattered near the back of the camp

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk shanty camp beneath a massive purple-lit overpass. A large bonfire burns brightly on the left while a figure sits on a red couch to the right. The camera walks forward slowly, passing the couch which exits the frame, with neon-lit skyscrapers towering in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt area under the overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the camp, moving past the bonfire toward the tent area

entered.detail: makeshift shelter with large beige umbrella canopy and draped fabric

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the camp, the camera passes the bonfire which now sits centrally in the frame. A canvas tent becomes visible on the left side in the distance. The purple-lit overpass structure continues to dominate the upper portion of the frame as the ground reveals scattered debris and makeshift platforms.

scene_state.functional_zone: tent area at the edge of the overpass

events.description: person becomes visible standing near the canvas tent on the left

agents.ego_description: approaching the tent area where a figure stands near the entrance

notable_agents.action: person standing near the tent entrance observing the surroundings

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the canvas tent on the left where a person stands near the entrance. The bonfire has shifted to the right side of the frame as the camera moves past it. The massive overpass structure now appears on the right while the neon-lit city skyline remains visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a cyberpunk shanty camp that shifts from a cozy fireside gathering to a deeper exploration of makeshift shelters beneath a massive overpass. It begins by passing a figure resting on a red couch to the right while a bright bonfire burns on the left, all set against a backdrop of towering neon skyscrapers. As the camera advances, the bonfire moves to the center of the frame and the ground reveals scattered debris and makeshift platforms under the dominant purple glow of the overhead structure. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches a canvas tent on the left where a person stands, causing the bonfire to slide toward the right of the frame. Finally, the perspective aligns with the massive overpass on the right while the illuminated city skyline remains visible in the distance.
